revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称 = 天地神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]平井1124 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天津彦火瓊瓊杵命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社…」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 天地神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]平井1124 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天津彦火瓊瓊杵命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 9月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=天地神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''天地神社'''（てんちじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]平井地区に鎮座する[[神社]]<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 平井地区の北部、JR[[函南駅]]から下ってくる[[静岡県道135号田原野函南停車場線|県道135号]]と、[[静岡県道11号熱海函南線|県道11号（熱函道路）]]が合流する部分の南方に鎮座している。
[[式内社]]である'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ 天地神社] - 八百万の神</ref>。
境内にある大きな[[クスノキ]]（樟）が、県指定の天然記念物になっている<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html ] - 静岡県</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[天津彦火瓊瓊杵命]]
== 境内 == * [[クスノキ]]（樟） - 県指定天然記念物<ref name="pref-kusu"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{デフォルトソート:てんちしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:函南町の建築物]] [[Category:函南町の歴史]]

{{神社 |名称 = 天地神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]平井1124 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天津彦火瓊瓊杵命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 9月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=天地神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''天地神社'''（てんちじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]平井地区に鎮座する[[神社]]<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 平井地区の北部、JR[[函南駅]]から下ってくる[[静岡県道135号田原野函南停車場線|県道135号]]と、[[静岡県道11号熱海函南線|県道11号（熱函道路）]]が合流する部分の南方に鎮座している。
[[式内社]]である'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ 天地神社] - 八百万の神</ref>。
境内にある大きな[[クスノキ]]（樟）が、県指定の天然記念物になっている<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html 天地神社の樟] - 静岡県</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[天津彦火瓊瓊杵命]]

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 天地神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]平井1124 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天津彦火瓊瓊杵命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 9月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=天地神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''天地神社'''（てんちじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]平井地区に鎮座する[[神社]]<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 平井地区の北部、JR[[函南駅]]から下ってくる[[静岡県道135号田原野函南停車場線|県道135号]]と、[[静岡県道11号熱海函南線|県道11号（熱函道路）]]が合流する部分の南方に鎮座している。
[[式内社]]である'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ 天地神社] - 八百万の神</ref>。
境内にある大きな[[クスノキ]]（樟）が、県指定の天然記念物になっている<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html 天地神社の樟] - 静岡県</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[天津彦火瓊瓊杵命]]
== 境内 == * [[クスノキ]]（樟） - 県指定天然記念物<ref name="pref-kusu"/>。
<gallery> Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|クスノキ（樟） </gallery>
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁

{{translated page|ja|天地神社|version=103406938|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 天地神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]平井1124 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天津彦火瓊瓊杵命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 9月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=天地神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''天地神社'''（てんちじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]平井地区に鎮座する[[神社]]<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 平井地区の北部、JR[[函南駅]]から下ってくる[[静岡県道135号田原野函南停車場線|県道135号]]と、[[静岡県道11号熱海函南線|県道11号（熱函道路）]]が合流する部分の南方に鎮座している。
[[式内社]]である'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ 天地神社] - 八百万の神</ref>。
境内にある大きな[[クスノキ]]（樟）が、県指定の天然記念物になっている<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html 天地神社の樟] - 静岡県</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[天津彦火瓊瓊杵命]]
== 境内 == * [[クスノキ]]（樟） - 県指定天然記念物<ref name="pref-kusu"/>。
<gallery> Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|クスノキ（樟） </gallery>
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁
==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:函南町の建築物]] [[Category:函南町の歴史]]

== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 天地神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|田方郡|Q1154841}}{{jalink|函南町|Q1203533}}平井1124 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天津彦火瓊瓊杵命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社、旧{{jalink|村社}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 9月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=天地神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''天地神社'''（てんちじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|田方郡|Q1154841}}{{jalink|函南町|Q1203533}}平井地区に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 平井地区の北部、JR{{jalink|函南駅|Q852321}}から下ってくる{{jalink|静岡県道135号田原野函南停車場線|Q11663291|県道135号}}と、{{jalink|静岡県道11号熱海函南線|Q11663278|県道11号（熱函道路）}}が合流する部分の南方に鎮座している。
{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ 天地神社] - 八百万の神</ref>。
境内にある大きな{{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（樟）が、県指定の天然記念物になっている<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html 天地神社の樟] - 静岡県</ref>。
== 祭神 == * {{jalink|天津彦火瓊瓊杵命}}
== 境内 == * {{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（樟） - 県指定天然記念物<ref name="pref-kusu"/>。
<gallery> Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|クスノキ（樟） </gallery>
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁
==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:函南町の建築物]] [[Category:函南町の歴史]]

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== Japanese content ==
{{神社

|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.4|N|138|57|41.1|E}}}}

'''天地神社'''（てんちじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|田方郡|Q1154841}}{{jalink|函南町|Q1203533}}平井地区に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
平井地区の北部、JR{{jalink|函南駅|Q852321}}から下ってくる{{jalink|静岡県道135号田原野函南停車場線|Q11663291|県道135号}}と、{{jalink|静岡県道11号熱海函南線|Q11663278|県道11号（熱函道路）}}が合流する部分の南方に鎮座している。

{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ 天地神社] - 八百万の神</ref>。

境内にある大きな{{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（樟）が、県指定の天然記念物になっている<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html 天地神社の樟] - 静岡県</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|天津彦火瓊瓊杵命}}

=== 境内 ===
* {{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（樟） - 県指定天然記念物<ref name="pref-kusu"/>。

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|クスノキ（樟）
</gallery>

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''天地神社'''（てんちじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|田方郡|Q1154841}}{{jalink|函南町|Q1203533}}平井地区に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 天地神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
平井地区の北部、JR{{jalink|函南駅|Q852321}}から下ってくる{{jalink|静岡県道135号田原野函南停車場線|Q11663291|県道135号}}と、{{jalink|静岡県道11号熱海函南線|Q11663278|県道11号（熱函道路）}}が合流する部分の南方に鎮座している。

{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）の論社となっている<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ 天地神社] - 八百万の神</ref>。

境内にある大きな{{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（樟）が、県指定の天然記念物になっている<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html 天地神社の樟] - 静岡県</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|天津彦火瓊瓊杵命}}

=== 境内 ===
* {{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}（樟） - 県指定天然記念物<ref name="pref-kusu"/>。

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|クスノキ（樟）
</gallery>

=== 脚注 ===

=== 外部リンク ===

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in the Hirai area of {{jalink|Kannami Town|Q1203533}}, {{jalink|Tagata District|Q1154841}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|Prefectural Route 135}}, descending from JR {{jalink|Kannami Station|Q852321}}, merges with {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{jalink|camphor tree|Q158722}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{jalink|Camphor tree|Q158722}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in the Hirai area of {{jalink|Kannami Town|Q1203533}}, {{jalink|Tagata District|Q1154841}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|Prefectural Route 135}}, descending from JR {{jalink|Kannami Station|Q852321}}, merges with {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{jalink|camphor tree|Q158722}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{jalink|Camphor tree|Q158722}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in the Hirai area of {{jalink|Kannami Town|Q1203533}}, {{jalink|Tagata District|Q1154841}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|Prefectural Route 135}}, descending from JR {{jalink|Kannami Station|Q852321}}, merges with {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{jalink|camphor tree|Q158722}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{jalink|Camphor tree|Q158722}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in the Hirai area of {{jalink|Kannami Town|Q1203533}}, {{jalink|Tagata District|Q1154841}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|Prefectural Route 135}}, descending from JR {{jalink|Kannami Station|Q852321}}, merges with {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{jalink|camphor tree|Q158722}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{jalink|Camphor tree|Q158722}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in the Hirai area of {{jalink|Kannami Town|Q1203533}}, {{jalink|Tagata District|Q1154841}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|Prefectural Route 135}}, descending from JR {{jalink|Kannami Station|Q852321}}, merges with {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{jalink|camphor tree|Q158722}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill||lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

</gallery>

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321|1=Kannami Station}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 11}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321|1=Kannami Station}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 11}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321|1=Kannami Station}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 11}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321|1=Kannami Station}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 11}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

|Image = {{Image requested|cat=Tagata District}}

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321|1=Kannami Station}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 11}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

<gallery>
Tenchi-jinja no Ōkusu 20121006.jpg|Camphor tree (kusu)
</gallery>

{{nihongo|'''Tenchi Shrine'''|天地神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321|1=Kannami Station}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 11}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsuhiko Hono no Ninigi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) - Prefectural Natural Monument<ref name="pref-kusu"/>.

'''Tenchi Shrine''' (てんちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Hirai area of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402078 Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is located in the northern part of the Hirai area, south of the point where {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 135 (Tawaranohara–Kannami Station Line)|Q11663291|WD=Q11663291|lt=Prefectural Route 135|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 135}}, descending from JR {{ill|lt=Kannami Station|Q852321|WD=Q852321|1=Kannami Station}}, merges with {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 11 (Atami–Kannami Line)|Q11663278|WD=Q11663278|lt=Prefectural Route 11 (Netsukan Road)|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 11}}.

It is considered a candidate shrine (ronsha) of '''Ametsuseketachi no Mikoto Shrine''' (阿米都瀬気多知命神社), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://yaokami.jp/1222875/ Tenchi Shrine] - Yaoyorozu no Kami</ref>

A large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} (kusu) within the shrine grounds has been designated a Prefectural Natural Monument.<ref name="pref-kusu">[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041885/1004984/1021393.html The camphor tree of Tenchi Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>
